texts: DRUG INTERACTION DATABASE ArogyaAI Cross-System Interactions INTERACTION: Metformin + Ashwagandha SEVERITY: Moderate EFFECT: Enhanced hypoglycemia risk MANAGEMENT: Monitor blood glucose closely when starting Ashwagandha. INTERACTION: Levothyroxine + Calcium/Iron supplements SEVERITY: Major EFFECT: Decreased levothyroxine absorption MANAGEMENT: Separate doses by at least 4 hours. INTERACTION: Aspirin + Ginkgo Biloba SEVERITY: Major EFFECT: Increased risk of bleeding MANAGEMENT: Avoid combination or monitor closely.
